name: Jilin Electric Power Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jilin Electric Power Co.,Ltd. engages in the power generation and heating businesses in China. The company produces, distributes, places, and sells electric power; produces and sells civilian and industrial heat; develops and constructs power stations; and offers after services. It generates electricity from thermal power, wind power, and photovoltaic sources. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Changchun, China.
